title: Budget to include additional salary
doc_html:
§325. Budget to include additional salary

           Each of the parishes composing the Fifteenth Judicial District shall annually budget an amount sufficient to pay the salaries fixed in R.S. 16:324.
doc_text:
§325.  Budget to include additional salary
Each of the parishes composing the Fifteenth Judicial District shall
annually budget an amount sufficient to pay the salaries fixed in R.S. 16:324.
